summary: The systemic interaction recovery chain is now closed in main, so the formal M7 content lock Human Gate is ready for product-owner reconsideration. Content lock remains not accepted until the product owner explicitly decides.
accepted_limits_if_approved: DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE remains preserved; manual node battle is not a M7/M8 blocker.
Edge/Firefox unresolved tooling rows, Windows DPI 150% follow-up, low-end Windows proxy limits, and agent-operated manual playthrough evidence remain carried limits.

No release, commercial, branding, telemetry, server, multiplayer, cloud-save implementation, account, paid service, secret, arbitrary-code mod, production cultural asset, or irreversible migration approval is implied.

tests_run.result: PASS; clean before closure branch edits.

decisions.decision: M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001 entered origin/main through PR #221 and is being closed by this checkpoint.
QA acceptance and systemic interaction validation do not substitute for product-owner approval.
M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 must not start while M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 remains BLOCKED.

risks.summary: Proceeding automatically would incorrectly convert a Human Gate into autonomous acceptance.
Validation accepted the interaction recovery, but small viewport density and low-fidelity visual quality can remain follow-up constraints if the product owner approves content lock with limits.

requested_action: Please decide whether the recovered systemic interaction experience is sufficient for APPROVE_CONTENT_LOCK_WITH_LIMITS, whether to DEFER_CONTENT_LOCK, or whether to REQUEST_CHANGES with specific remaining issues.
